Supplemental Allotments for Fiscal Year EndingJune 30, 1974, , , authorized a State, for fiscal year ending , to receive an additional supplemental allotment to match excess of amount of allotments which such State would have received under sections 703 and 704 of this title for such year if had not been enacted over aggregate of allotments which such State actually received under such sections plus aggregate of grants received under sections 708, 709, and 710 of this title for fiscal year ending , and authorized appropriations necessary for supplemental allotments.Pub.
